subject: perf(ui): stabilize render-path object references in LocationSearch and StationList
body:
Inline style objects in .map() and FlatList renderItem create new references every
render, defeating React's shallow comparison and causing unnecessary child re-renders.

LocationSearch:
- Extract { borderBottomWidth, borderBottomColor } to useMemo (separatorStyle)
  so FlatList renderItem and .map() items share one stable reference
- Extract recent search onPress handler to useCallback (handleSelectRecent)
  so .map() items don't create new closures per render

StationList:
- SkeletonCard: Replace inline { backgroundColor: colors.base100 } with className
  bg-base-100 — eliminates JS color resolution, uses CSS variable directly
- Remove colors prop from SkeletonCard and SkeletonList — no longer needed

Tags: perf, ui, search, station-list, render-optimization
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-integration
Semver: patch
